supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric Customers in US regions may experience issues while interacting with Copilot Service and, accessing ML experiments and Models. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
active.detailsText: Fabric Customers in US regions may experience issues while interacting with Copilot Service and, accessing ML experiments and Models. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
